quizTitle: AI, Gen AI & Agentic AI in BFSI – Batch B

questions.question: In the deck's concept stack, which layer is described as 'creates content'?
On the maturity curve, which stage covers 'chatbots, co-pilots, document drafting at scale'?
What is KPMG cited as estimating for 2025?
options: 44% of finance teams using agentic AI
$50B in global spend on agentic AI

questions.question: Which four UK banks does the deck name as running real-time ML models for fraud & transaction monitoring?
Which three fintech challengers does the deck name as competing with UK incumbents?
What UK-bank result does the deck cite for embedding AI agents into loan approval workflows?
In insurance, what percentage lower cost does the deck cite for building production GenAI systems vs. the 2022 baseline?
In asset & wealth management, what does agentic AI replace the 'monthly review cadence' with?
Which two firms does the deck name as participating in the FCA's AI Live Testing?
What was distinctive about the NatWest × FITT partnership, according to the deck?
options: It was FITT's largest research grant ever received
It was FITT's first-ever partnership with a global bank
It was announced by the Reserve Bank of India
It focused exclusively on blockchain research

questions.question: Per the 'Career Takeaways' slide, what does the 'Business–tech translator' role bridge?
options: Two competing banks during a merger
Data science teams and business/compliance stakeholders

questions.question: Per the closing summary slide, which sector is described as scoping agentic AI 'more cautiously' than banking?
